rationale: The US-Iran ceasefire continuation and imminent peace deal signing maintain energy price relief relevant to Romania; no new qualitative developments affecting Romania directly this cycle.

top_events.title: US, Iran confirm ceasefire; peace deal signing Friday
top_events.summary: The US-Iran deal moves toward formal signing — a small incremental step from last cycle's confirmation. Energy cost relief for Romania continues but no new qualitative shift.

top_events.title: Stock markets soar, oil falls as US-Iran deal confirmed
top_events.summary: Falling oil prices provide continued indirect relief for Romanian energy costs and inflation, but this is a continuation of last cycle's development.

top_events.title: Protesters clash with police ahead of G7 summit in Geneva
top_events.summary: Anti-G7 protests in Geneva are a distant event with negligible direct impact on Romanian daily life.
